name: Firepower Blockade
descriptionTemplate: When your attack causes the morale of the enemy to be low or diminished, there is X% probability to attack again. When your attack causes the morale of the enemy to go into chaos, there is 100% probability to attack again (inactive for enemies already in chaos)
